text:
From: Seawind Chartering <chartering@seawind.com.hk>
Sent: Friday, July 4, 2025 12:26 PM
To: chartering@seawind.com.hk <chartering@seawind.com.hk>
Subject: SEAWIND FIRM REQUIREMENT - HANDY UPTO UMAX - 1TCT / ECI TO WAFR

AFTER HAVING FIXED OUR 3 SIMILAR REQUIREMENTS THIS WEEK,

PLEASE PROPOSE SUITABLE TONNAGE FOR OUR BELOW REQUIREMENT

FULLY FIRM & BOOKED CARGO

ACCT SEAWIND ( OUR USUAL ONE )
- SMAX / UMAX
- LAYCAN: 15-20 JULY (TRY EARLY)
- DELY: APS KAKINADA
- RE-DELY: W.AFR (EXCL HRA)
- 1TCT WITH H'LESS BAGGED RICE
- DURATION: ABT 70 DAYS WOG
- NEED ICA
- 3.75 PCT ADCOM HERE
